specific_mechanism: Plant leaves arrange in spiral phyllotaxis with golden-angle (137.5°) divergence to minimize self-shading; the spiral emerges from auxin-driven reaction-diffusion dynamics in the meristem
llm_application: LLM attention head positioning via golden-angle distribution to minimize attention head redundancy; treat each head as a leaf and the prompt-token sequence as the meristem shoot.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes botany phase-coherence mapping as proposed.
